case_title: NERSVEEN, JOSEPH R. VS AVILES-LANDAU, JENNIFER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NERSVEEN, JOSEPH R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVILES-LANDAU, JENNIFER $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,634.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
